title: Kai PvP
description: A modpack made for the best fps possible along with some essential PvP mods.
body:
# ** Kai PvP Modpack **

Introducing Kai PvP, A modpack made purely for fps with some essential pvp mods.
### 
### Features:
- Essential PvP Mods 🔧: Only adds essential pvp mods like shield status, totem counter, freelook etc.
- Performance Optimization 🚀: Adds minimal but essential FPS mods like sodium, entity culling modernfix etc.
- Quality of life 💎: Adds a few Qol mods like shulker tooltip, no loading screen, old damage tilt etc.


### Current Versions: 
```
1.21
```

More updates coming soon!
